title: Perma (buildings)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|buildings on the planet [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]|the planet [[Perma]]}}
The '''Perma''' was the name for a ring of buildings on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]. The buildings in this arc were those that had a permanent place surrounding the [[Daya]], a grand plaza in the center of the profitable [[Elrood Bazaar]]. Businesses which were able to keep their building in the Perma were able to receive more business. [[Transsector Lines Ltd.]] and maintained a presence in the Perma even though their corporate headquarters were located in the city of [[Dinbar/Legends|Dinbar]]. The [[Professiona Artists Guild]] also had a place in the Perma from where their art could be seen.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
